_comment_top: SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception. JSON has no comment syntax; the SPDX header rides on this top-level key per specs/010-t8-tree-sitter-grammar/research.md §9 (and the T1 precedent at test/tooling/textmate/package.json). This package.json declares the tree-sitter-cli toolchain (devDependency, build-time only) and the web-tree-sitter runtime (dependency, consumed by the VS Code extension shell at editors/vscode/treesitter/). It is NOT a publishable npm package; the publishable artefact is the VS Code extension which packages the WASM build separately. The tree-sitter-cli minor-version pin is locked by Clarifications session 2026-05-05 Q1 → Option B; the package-lock.json governs the exact patch installed in CI per Constitution Principle V.
name: tree-sitter-nsl
description: Tree-sitter grammar for NSL (Next Synthesis Language). Source artefacts (grammar.js, queries/highlights.scm) plus generator-output (parser.c, grammar.json, node-types.json). Consumed by editor integrations: VS Code via editors/vscode/treesitter/ at T8; Neovim/Emacs/Sublime at T11.
